recommendations.title: Make Powerwash win generic head terms
recommendations.detail: Powerwash converts but ranks behind the Ultra parent on 'dish soap' and 'liquid dish soap'. Add the generic head keywords to Powerwash's title and backend search terms and drive Sponsored to it so organic follows the conversion signal.

recommendations.title: Consolidate Dawn child ASINs into review-rich parents
recommendations.detail: Dawn's review equity is spread across many child listings, weakening any single organic slot. Parent-child roll-ups concentrate ratings and sales rank, lifting the anchor listing on both retailers.

recommendations.title: Close the Great Value gap on Walmart
recommendations.detail: Great Value out-ranks Dawn on Walmart for 'dish soap','liquid dish soap' and 'dish detergent'. Improve Walmart content quality score (imagery, attributes, 3P reviews via Spark) and Walmart Connect sponsored to reclaim slot 1-2.

recommendations.title: Own the 'grease' intent cluster
recommendations.detail: Dawn already leads 'dish soap for grease' — extend it by leading titles with 'Cuts Grease', adding grease before/after A+ modules and a short degrease video to defend against Palmolive and private label.

recommendations.title: Lift conversion on the head listings
recommendations.detail: Organic rank on Amazon/Walmart is conversion-driven. Refresh main images to comparison-legible packs, tighten the first three bullets to benefit-led copy, and add video to raise CVR on the Ultra and Platinum head ASINs.

recommendations.title: Stop chasing auto-dishwasher terms
recommendations.detail: 'Dishwasher soap' is auto-dishwasher intent owned by Cascade/Finish; Dawn cannot rank organically and should not try. Redirect that budget to the hand-dish terms where Dawn can hold top-4.
